description_long: This office building features a bold, geometric facade with a predominantly black, white, and gray color palette. The structure is characterized by strong vertical and horizontal lines, with ribbed columns and layered ledges that create a sense of depth and symmetry. The front entrance is recessed and flanked by prominent columns, while the upper levels are adorned with horizontal bands and a series of dark-tinted windows. The roof is flat and includes several angular, industrial-looking structures, possibly for ventilation or mechanical systems. The sides of the building are similarly detailed, with large, vertically-oriented panels and projecting elements that enhance its modern, fortress-like appearance. The overall design suggests a contemporary, high-security office environment with minimal ornamentation and a focus on structural expression.
description: A modern, geometric office building with a black, white, and gray color scheme, featuring strong vertical columns, layered ledges, and a recessed main entrance.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the recessed main entrance, flanked by ribbed columns and horizontal bands, with a symmetrical, imposing facade.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals large, vertically-oriented panels and projecting ledges, as well as rooftop mechanical structures.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a series of stacked, horizontal elements and a flat roof with angular rooftop features, lacking a visible entrance.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with prominent vertical panels, layered ledges, and visible rooftop structures.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, horizontal bands of rectangular windows on each floor, separated by prominent vertical columns.
